reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
XS사이즈 너무 좋아요!
사주고 싶어도 S사이즈 조차 커서 못입히는 기능성 패딩들이 많았는데요 이건 XS사이즈가 있어서 너무 좋네요
이번 겨울에만 패딩을 2개나 사서 고민하다 구매한건데 제일 만족하는 패딩이에요!! 𖤐_𖤐 
신제품 나왔을때부터 관심이 있긴 했는데 가격이 제법 나가는 제품이라 찜만 해뒀었거든요. 
근데 스타필드에서 실물을 보고 만져봤는데 너무 좋은거에요 
가볍고 진짜 따듯할거같은게 반해버렸죠.. 매장에는 S사이즈 밖에 없어서 입혀봤는데 역시나 S는 좀 크더라구요 
그러면 XS사면 딱 맞겠구나! 해서 어플들어와서 바로 질렀어요 ◡̈ 

1.7kg 인데 맞춤 패딩마냥 몸에 꼭 맞고 가볍고, 엉덩이부분이 들뜨지 않아 바람 들어갈일 없어 보여서 너무 좋아요~! 
그동안 바잇미에서 나온 패딩들은 XS사이즈가 없어서 못입혔었는데 이번에 작은사이즈도 출시해주셔서 감사할따름입니다..!
앞으로도 작은 친구들을 위해 다양한 의류들 XS사이즈 제작 많이 해주세요🙏🏻

진짜 가볍고 포근해서 추위에 약한 친구들, 불편하면 안걷는 친구들에게 강추하는 패딩입니다❄️🐶
reviews.content_en:
The XS size is amazing! 🐶 There were so many functional padded jackets that were too big even in size S, so I'm really happy this one comes in XS. I bought 2 padded jackets this winter and was torn about which to get, but this is definitely my favorite!! 𖤐_𖤐 I've been interested since the new product came out, but it was pricey so I just wishlisted it. Then I saw and touched the actual product at Starfield and it was so good! It's lightweight and looks like it'll be genuinely warm - I was totally smitten. The store only had size S, so I tried it on and sure enough, S was a bit too big. So I thought if I get XS it'll fit perfectly! and came right here to the app and bought it ◡̈

At 1.7kg, it fits my pup's body like a custom-made padded jacket - lightweight and snug, with the rear not gaping so no wind gets in. I love it so much~! BITE ME's previous padded jackets didn't come in XS so my pup couldn't wear them, but thank you so much for releasing a smaller size this time..! Going forward, please make lots of different clothing items in XS size for the little ones 🙏🏻

It's genuinely lightweight and cozy - highly recommend this padded jacket for pups who are sensitive to cold and those who won't walk if they're uncomfortable ❄️🐶

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
소재도 좋고 모자안감도 부들부들 너무 마음에 들어요 저는요ㅋㅋㅋ 저희강아지는 움직이지않았지만 곧 적응하겠죠?ㅋㅋ
비숑 4.5키로인데 털찐상태라 5키로정도 되는크기??인데 라지 넉넉하게 맞아요^^
 신경써서 만드신거같습니다!! 
색조합도 마음에 들고 잘산템이네여ㅋ 
올겨울패딩 미리준비잘했습니당!!!
reviews.content_en: The material is great and the hat lining is so soft - I really love it lol 😂 My pup didn't move around much but she'll adapt soon, right? lol 😂 My Bichon is 4.5kg but with her fluffy coat she's probably about 5kg, and the Large fits her nicely and roomy ^^ You can tell it was made with care!! I love the color combo too - it's such a good purchase! I'm all set with my winter padding for this season!! 😊

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
우선 너무~예뻐요.
4킬로 말티푸 M과 L사이즈에서
무지 고민했어요.
이너티들은 대부분 L사이즈를
구매하는데 바잇미 패딩은 크게
나와서 M을 입혔거든요.
엉덩이를 덮이도록 입히고
싶은데 그러면 품이 너무
클것같아 몇날며칠을 고민
하다 M사이즈구매 아주 딱 맞아요.
라지였음 컸을듯도 싶어요.
앞부분이 어깨까지 가려지니
바람 안들고 따뜻할것 같습니다.
reviews.content_en: First of all, it's so pretty! My 4kg Maltipoo had me torn between M and L. I usually buy L for inner wear, but BITE ME's padding runs large so I went with M. I wanted it to cover the rear, but if I did that the fit would be too loose, so I agonized over it for days... I got the M size and it fits perfectly! An L probably would've been too big. The front covers up to the shoulders so no wind gets in and it looks like it'll be warm.

reviews.name: 뚜****
reviews.content: 지인 강아지가 입은거 보고 너무 예쁘고 좋아보여서 바로 구매했어요 고민 많이 하다가 블루 골랐는데 맘에들어요 ㅎㅎ 색감 너무 예쁘고, 볼륨감 대비 정말 가볍지만 따뜻해요! ㄹ리페어 키트까지 엄청 세심한 제품이라 선물하기도 좋을거같아요.  가둘 48cm 몸무게 7.6kg 푸들 엑라 잘 맞습니다 ㅎㅎ 정사이즈 선택하심 될듯
reviews.content_en: I saw a friend's dog wearing it and thought it looked so pretty and great, so I bought it right away. I deliberated for a while and chose blue, and I love it ㅎㅎ The color is so pretty, and despite the volume it's incredibly lightweight but warm! It even comes with a repair kit - such a thoughtfully made product that it would be great as a gift too. My Poodle with a 48cm chest and 7.6kg weight fits the regular size perfectly ㅎㅎ Choosing the regular size should work out great!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 설빔으로 좋은가격에 좋은제품 구매하게되서 너무좋아요,사이즈도 딱이고 설명처럼 가볍네요.  잘입힐게. 감사합니다.
reviews.content_en: I'm so happy I got a good quality product at a great price for Lunar New Year! The size is perfect and it's lightweight just like the description says. My pup will wear it well. Thank you!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 무게 보고 이 패딩으로 골랐어요. 가벼워서 마음에 들어요.
reviews.content_en: I chose this padding after checking the weight. I love how lightweight it is.

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
한파때도 끄뜩없을것 같습니다.
아주 가볍고 따뜻해보입니다
reviews.content_en: Looks like it'll handle even the coldest weather just fine. It's very lightweight and looks warm.
